texto: No achingJust numbnessSadnessThat feeling as ifU miss himBut then you realized,Maybe he wasn't yours To begin with.AndThere were no memories To Reminisce,Only pain.Because you knewFrom the very beginningHe didn't love u as muchAs you loved him.And that isthe most painfulAnd crucial part.Or maybe not.Maybe it's the truth That there isStill an ounce ofLove that shouldn'tBe there at all.Not after everything.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Marianne Escobar sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “No achingJust numbnessSadnessThat feeling as ifU miss himBut then you realized,Maybe he wasn't yo…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, broken, hurt, útil em momentos de hurt e love.
